plan.goal: Make shared runtime the sole owner of append-only change history, remove tracked `.prism/state/changes/**`, keep tracked `.prism/state` as stable semantic state only, and rely on signed Git commit history plus PRISM manifest metadata for durable coarse-grained publish history.
plan.title: Remove tracked changes from .prism state and rely on signed commit history plus manifest metadata
